overview.description: The Collaborative Investment - Mindful Conservative ETF (MFUL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in target risk asset allocation. The fund is an actively managed ETF that aims to seek current income using an adaptive, conservative strategy that aims to performs adequately during a recovery. The fund invests in a variety of asset classes using a tactical go-anywhere approach. MFUL was launched on Nov 3, 2021 and is issued by Mohr Funds.
